name: MiraeAsset KOSPI ShortStrangle
summary: MiraeAsset KOSPI ShortStrangle is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) managed by Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd, employing a short strangle strategy on the KOSPI index. A short strangle involves selling both a call and a put option on the same underlying asset, with different strike prices. It is listed on the Korea Exchange.
